title: Backup of Postgres brain schema
userStory: As an operator, I want the brain schema backed up alongside FalkorDB so that drafts, tool_calls, and migration_log survive too.
acceptanceCriteria: If Postgres is not already covered by Phase 0 backups, the nightly cron runs: pg_dump --schema=brain personal | gzip | rclone rcat r2:brainbot-backups/postgres/brain-${TS}.sql.gz
If Phase 0 backups exist, document that they cover the brain schema and skip duplication
Verify: latest dump downloads; gunzip + psql --dry-parse confirms it is a valid SQL stream
